name: Classic Martini
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake or mix gin and vermouth with ice.
2. Strain into a martini glass.
3. Garnish with olive.
Serves 1.
VARIATION: Dirty Martini - Pour some olive juice and particles into the martini.
Per serving: 188 calories, 1 gram fat (5 percent of calories), 0 milligrams cholesterol, 0 grams protein, 95 grams carbohydrate, 2 milligrams sodium.
